title: 银行信息、付款错误和退款路径
theme: 从 beneficiary account / wrong payment / refund request 开始
goals: 能在客户付款前确认收款账户、账户名和 SWIFT code
能处理客户打错账户、金额少付或银行扣费的场景
能解释退款、差额补付或下单抵扣的处理路径

review.title: Day 23 复习
items: 昨天练了 invoice、packing list、HS code、declared value、customs documents 和 consignee。
今天继续财务沟通的最后一课：付款前核对银行信息，付款后处理错误、扣费和退款。
涉及钱的沟通要特别谨慎：不要随口承诺 refund，要先让财务核实金额、路径和手续费。

preview.scenario: 客户付款前要求确认收款账户；付款后发现打错账户、到账金额少、银行扣费，或要求退款。你需要准确说明下一步处理方式。
needToKnow: beneficiary account 和 account name 必须和 PI 上的信息一致。
wrong payment 需要先收集交易记录，再由财务和银行核实。
refund request 不能只说 yes，要说明审核、手续费、时间和可选抵扣方案。

vocabulary.usage: 用于银行转账中的收款方账户。
vocabulary.example: Please make sure the beneficiary account matches the PI.

vocabulary.usage: 用于确认银行账户的收款公司名称。
vocabulary.example: Please check the account name before arranging payment.

vocabulary.usage: 用于国际电汇中识别收款银行。
vocabulary.example: Please use the SWIFT code shown on the PI.

vocabulary.meaning: 错误付款 / 付款错误
vocabulary.usage: 用于客户打错账户、金额或收款方。
vocabulary.example: If it was a wrong payment, please contact your bank immediately.

vocabulary.meaning: 退款申请 / 退款请求
vocabulary.usage: 用于客户要求退回多付、错付或取消订单款项。
vocabulary.example: We need finance approval before processing the refund request.

vocabulary.usage: 用于银行手续费、下单抵扣或金额差额扣除。
vocabulary.example: The deduction may be caused by the bank charge.

vocabulary.meaning: 付款更正 / 付款修正
vocabulary.usage: 用于客户付款信息或金额错误后进行更正。
vocabulary.example: Please arrange the payment correction after checking with your bank.

vocabulary.usage: 用于银行转账过程中填错信息或金额。
vocabulary.example: Please send us the transaction record if there was a transfer mistake.

sentences.label: 付款前核对账户
sentences.natural: Please check the beneficiary account before arranging payment.
sentences.business: Please make sure the beneficiary account, account name, and SWIFT code match the PI before arranging payment.

sentences.label: 处理错误付款
sentences.natural: If it was a wrong payment, please contact your bank immediately.
sentences.business: If it was a wrong payment or transfer mistake, please contact your bank immediately and send us the transaction record for checking.

sentences.label: 解释银行扣款
sentences.natural: The deduction may be caused by the bank charge.
sentences.business: The deduction may be caused by the intermediary bank charge, so please confirm the fee details with your bank.

sentences.label: 说明退款申请流程
sentences.natural: We need finance approval before processing the refund request.
sentences.business: We need finance approval and bank confirmation before processing the refund request, and the bank fee may be deducted.

sentences.label: 建议差额抵扣
sentences.natural: We can deduct the amount from your next order.
sentences.business: If you prefer, we can keep the extra amount as a credit and deduct it from your next order.

chatAnalysis.problem: 能理解，但不够明确，客户付款时需要核对账户、户名和 SWIFT code。
chatAnalysis.better: Please check the beneficiary account before arranging payment.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Please make sure the beneficiary account, account name, and SWIFT code match the PI before arranging payment.

chatAnalysis.problem: 语气像指责客户，且没有说明下一步要联系银行和提供交易记录。
chatAnalysis.better: If it was a wrong payment, please contact your bank immediately.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: If it was a wrong payment or transfer mistake, please contact your bank immediately and send us the transaction record for checking.

chatAnalysis.problem: 退款涉及财务和银行审核，不能直接承诺。
chatAnalysis.better: We need finance approval before processing the refund request.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: We need finance approval and bank confirmation before processing the refund request, and the bank fee may be deducted.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：付款前核对账户

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you confirm the bank details before we pay?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Please make sure the beneficiary account, account name, and SWIFT code match the PI.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay, I will ask our finance team to check.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Please let us know if your bank needs any additional information.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：客户发现打错账户

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We may have sent the payment to the wrong account.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: If it was a wrong payment, please contact your bank immediately.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What should we send you?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please send us the transaction record so our finance team can check it.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：客户要求退款

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We paid too much. Please refund the extra amount.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. We need finance approval before processing the refund request.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Will there be any deduction?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The bank fee may be deducted, but we will confirm the exact amount before processing it.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：付款前核对、错付和退款处理

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Hi, our finance team is preparing the payment. Can you confirm the bank details again?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. Please make sure the beneficiary account, account name, and SWIFT code match the PI.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The account name is a little different from the company name on the invoice.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Please do not arrange payment yet. I will check the account name with our finance team first.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay, please confirm quickly.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I will confirm it now and send you the correct beneficiary account information again.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Actually, our finance team already sent the payment this morning.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. Could you please send us the transaction record for checking?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We are worried it may be a transfer mistake.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: If it was a wrong payment or transfer mistake, please contact your bank immediately.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you check if the money arrived in your account?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, I will ask our finance team to check the bank account, but it may take some time if the payment is still under bank review.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If it goes to the wrong account, can you refund it?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: If we receive the wrong payment, we need finance approval and bank confirmation before processing the refund request.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Will the bank fee be deducted from the refund?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The bank fee may be deducted. We will confirm the exact deduction before processing the refund.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What if the received amount is less than the PI amount?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: If the difference is caused by a bank charge, we can confirm whether you prefer to pay the difference or deduct it from the next order.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can we keep the extra amount for the next order instead of refunding it?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, if you prefer, we can keep the extra amount as a credit and deduct it from your next order.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please write that clearly in the payment record.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No problem. We will note the credit amount clearly after finance confirmation.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: For future payments, should we always use the PI bank details?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. Please always use the beneficiary account, account name, and SWIFT code shown on the latest PI.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Understood. Please update us after your finance team checks the transaction.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will keep you posted after finance confirmation and bank checking.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：请确认收款账户、账户名称和 SWIFT code 与 PI 一致。
exercises.answer: Please make sure the beneficiary account, account name, and SWIFT code match the PI.
acceptable: please make sure the beneficiary account account name and swift code match the pi
please make sure the beneficiary account account name and swift code are the same as the pi

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更专业：you paid wrong account
exercises.answer: If it was a wrong payment or transfer mistake, please contact your bank immediately and send us the transaction record for checking.
acceptable: if it was a wrong payment or transfer mistake please contact your bank immediately and send us the transaction record for checking
if it was a wrong payment please contact your bank immediately and send us the transaction record
exercises.hint: 避免指责客户，说明 wrong payment / transfer mistake 后的下一步。

exercises.prompt: 填空：The bank fee may be ____ from the refund.
exercises.hint: deduction 是扣除，deducted 是被扣除。

exercises.prompt: 客户要求退款，哪个回复更合适？
options: We need finance approval and bank confirmation before processing the refund request.
exercises.answer: We need finance approval and bank confirmation before processing the refund request.
acceptable: we need finance approval and bank confirmation before processing the refund request
exercises.hint: 退款要等 finance approval 和 bank confirmation。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：如果您愿意，我们可以把多余金额作为下个订单的抵扣。
exercises.answer: If you prefer, we can keep the extra amount as a credit and deduct it from your next order.
acceptable: if you prefer we can keep the extra amount as a credit and deduct it from your next order
if you prefer we can deduct the extra amount from your next order
exercises.hint: deduct it from your next order 表示从下个订单抵扣。

exercises.prompt: 客户说：We may have sent the payment to the wrong account. 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: If it was a wrong payment, please contact your bank immediately and send us the transaction record for checking.
acceptable: if it was a wrong payment please contact your bank immediately and send us the transaction record for checking
please contact your bank immediately and send us the transaction record for checking
exercises.hint: 先让客户联系银行，再索要 transaction record。

homework: 把 beneficiary account、account name、SWIFT code、wrong payment、refund request、deduction、payment correction、transfer mistake 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍，重点练 wrong payment 和 refund request 的谨慎表达。
写一段 WhatsApp 回复：客户可能打错账户，你要让客户联系银行、发交易记录，并说明退款需财务和银行确认。
tomorrow: Day 25 会练货代仓库、提货和截仓时间，进入物流清关、到货和售后阶段。
